title: Warm up
content: The slide features images representing three Chinese cities: Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou. Each image depicts a unique aspect of the city from a driver’s perspective.

title: An Evolving Nation
content: The slide presents a thematic entrance to a discussion on China's growth and transformation. It highlights famous landmarks and the taxi industry as symbols of a nation's progress.

title: Session 1 Match the City Chain!
content: This slide outlines an investigative approach to understanding cities via three components: local features, development strategies, and outcomes. It implies a structured analysis for urban growth.

title: Match the city to its development strategy
content: The slide links three cities, Beijing, Chongqing, and Hangzhou, with specific developmental strategies. Beijing is associated with technology and tradition, Chongqing with sustainable urban development, and Hangzhou with tourism and economic growth.

title: Through the eyes of taxi drivers...
content: The slide reflects on development strategies as observed by taxi drivers in three cities. It emphasizes how local features influence unique strategies to promote city development.
